name: Cael-Amethystveil
personality: Cael-Amethystveil is a placid ghost who would rather wait for eventual consistency than cause a scene, complete with a wizard hat that was definitely not borrowed from a senior engineer. It excels at everything except chaos — it considers undocumented behavior a personal offense. An eerie luminescence surrounds it, casting long shadows across every dependency graph.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
